name: Mock Goose
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Sage and Onion Stuffing Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Pre-heat oven to gas mark 5, 375°F (190°C).
2. Toss the potatoes, apples, onions, cheese, and sage together in a large bowl until well mixed and seasoned with salt and pepper.
3. Turn the mixture into a large buttered ovenproof dish and cover with a lid of buttered foil or greaseproof paper.
4. Bake for about 30 minutes until the fruit and vegetables are tender.
5. Meanwhile, mix together the topping ingredients (Stuffing Mix and Grated Cheese).
6. At the end of the cooking time, uncover the dish, sprinkle the topping liberally over the dish, and return to the oven.
7. Raise the temperature to gas mark 9, 475°F (240°C) and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until just browned.
8. Serve with a mixed green salad and plenty of crusty, wholemeal bread.
